item.title: DCWP final decision: NYC DCWP against J&O Security Services, Inc. and Joseph Osagie, 04/30/2021

OATH Index No. 2830/18 Final Agency Decision On November 5, 2020, Administrative Law Judge Joycelyn McGeachy-Kuls of the Office of Administrative Trials and Hearings ("OATH") issued a Report and Recommendation in the above-captioned matter. OATH…
